Catalog highlights

  • Emblems for complex designs and small lettering.
  • Sublimation process which involves special inks which are heat sealed
  • Simple shape patches have a merrowed edge
  • Full Color Dye Sublimated Print
  • Free Ground Shipping to One Location in the Contiguous U.S.

Patch options (supplier)

Options and add-ons from the live Distributor Central product page for this SKU. Pricing may change; confirm on your quote.

Additional Options - Woven Patches ▼

More than 5 Thread Colors

Additional Options - Patches

This option is if you require more than 5 thread colors. Please note that the charge is per additional color/per patch.

$0.09 each

Border Options - Dye Sub ▼

These are the border options available for Dye Sub patches.

Merrowed

Border Options - Patches

A 1/8” border that overlocks the patch edge, preventing fraying. For large, simple shapes like circles and shields. Provides stability and prevents curling.

Patches: Sew Out ▼

Photo of Sew Out

Final quote may reflect selected options, proofs, rush, or freight beyond list pricing.
salesToolsHtml:
Pitch this SKU — 2.5" Dye Sublimated Patch. Lead with use case (uniforms, retail, teams, recognition), then minimums and timeline. Reference included services from “Price includes” in the Description tab when present (e.g. setup, virtual proof, shipping offers).

  • Quote style DSP-25 on proposals and POs.
  • Offer virtual proofs and artwork checks before production.
  • Cross-sell with hats, bags, or jackets for kit programs.
  • For gradient or photo-real art, steer toward dye sublimated or woven; for 3D brand marks, PVC or embroidered.

Approved partners can request internal sell sheets, comparison matrices, and margin guidance from the A Design Line team.
inventoryHtml:
Custom patches are built to order. We do not stock finished inventory for arbitrary reorder without a new run.

Supplier-stated production window: 12 days (not including transit).

Contact the studio for rush feasibility, split shipments, or multi-location drops before placing large orders.

Minimum order quantity: 100 units (per catalog line).
